name: CERTInext AnyCA REST Gateway Plugin
description: AnyCA REST Gateway plugin for CERTInext (eMudhra) certificate lifecycle management platform

ca_plugin_config.name: ApiUrl
ca_plugin_config.description: REQUIRED: Base URL of the CERTInext REST API, e.g. https://us.certinext.io

ca_plugin_config.name: AuthMode
ca_plugin_config.description: REQUIRED: Authentication mode — one of 'ApiKey', 'Basic', or 'OAuth2'. Default: 'ApiKey'.

ca_plugin_config.name: ApiKey
ca_plugin_config.description: API key for authenticating with CERTInext. Required when AuthMode is 'ApiKey'.

ca_plugin_config.name: Username
ca_plugin_config.description: Username for Basic authentication. Required when AuthMode is 'Basic'.

ca_plugin_config.name: Password
ca_plugin_config.description: Password for Basic authentication. Required when AuthMode is 'Basic'.

ca_plugin_config.name: OAuth2TokenUrl
ca_plugin_config.description: OAuth2 token endpoint URL. Required when AuthMode is 'OAuth2'. Example: https://us.certinext.io/oauth/token

ca_plugin_config.name: OAuth2ClientId
ca_plugin_config.description: OAuth2 client ID. Required when AuthMode is 'OAuth2'.

ca_plugin_config.name: OAuth2ClientSecret
ca_plugin_config.description: OAuth2 client secret. Required when AuthMode is 'OAuth2'.

ca_plugin_config.name: IgnoreExpired
ca_plugin_config.description: If true, expired certificates will be skipped during synchronization. Default: false.

ca_plugin_config.name: PageSize
ca_plugin_config.description: Number of certificates to fetch per page during synchronization. Default: 100, max: 500.

ca_plugin_config.name: Enabled
ca_plugin_config.description: Flag to Enable or Disable gateway functionality. Disabling is primarily used to allow creation of the CA connector prior to configuration information being available.

enrollment_config.name: ProfileId
enrollment_config.description: REQUIRED: The CERTInext certificate profile/product ID to use for enrollment. This maps to a profile configured in the CERTInext portal.

enrollment_config.name: ValidityDays
enrollment_config.description: OPTIONAL: Validity period in days for issued certificates. If omitted, the profile default is used.

enrollment_config.name: AutoApprove
enrollment_config.description: OPTIONAL: If true, the gateway will attempt automatic approval of certificates returned in a pending-approval state. Default: false.

enrollment_config.name: RequesterName
enrollment_config.description: OPTIONAL: Default requester name to include in the enrollment request.

enrollment_config.name: RenewalWindowDays
enrollment_config.description: OPTIONAL: Number of days before expiration within which a renewal is attempted instead of a reissue. Default: 90.

enrollment_config.name: KeyType
enrollment_config.description: OPTIONAL: Key algorithm hint (e.g. 'RSA2048', 'RSA4096', 'EC256', 'EC384'). If omitted, the profile default is used.
